title: Dev-only: never real endpoints or real personal data
statement: The service is a development mock. It must never be configured to call real SENATRAN/DENATRAN/SERPRO endpoints, and its database must never contain real personal data. All seeded identities are synthetic. No production credentials, certificates, or hostnames are committed. Configuration defaults target a local database only.
rationale: The mock reproduces a government registry API surface that in production carries sensitive personal data (drivers, vehicles, infractions). Confusing the mock for the real integration, or loading real data into it, would be a privacy and compliance breach.
